text.title: Multimodal VUI Design Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying multimodal-vui-design. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Feature mixes voice-initiated + screen-initiated; users confused which surface to trust.
antipattern.fix: Pick one of four; refactor if needed.

antipattern.symptom: Prompt times out with no UI; user thinks device froze.
antipattern.fix: Add timeout + error-state UI + retry affordance.

antipattern.symptom: Voice fires intent A but screen shows result B in 12 % of runs.
antipattern.fix: Add automated test running 100 dialogues + verifying screen state per turn.

antipattern.symptom: Spanish-locale device fails ASR; team had English prompts only.
antipattern.fix: Localise prompts per supported locale + test ASR per locale.
